headline: KKR & Co. Inc.: 7%+ Investment-Grade From Its Baby Bonds
summary: KKR & Co. Inc. baby bonds offer a 7.74% yield, presenting undervalued potential despite rate risks. See why KKR stock is undervalued and a hold.
